nodes.label: React + TypeScript + Vite template
nodes.rationale: Provides a minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and some ESLint rules.

nodes.label: React Compiler
nodes.rationale: Not enabled on this template because of its impact on dev and build performance; README points to React documentation for installation.
